evidence.title: Chemistry 2e
evidence.usage: Complete hydrocarbon combustion products and balancing

premises.statement: Every reviewed unbranched alkane CnH(2n+2) has a generated atom-conserving complete-combustion graph rewrite to CO2 and H2O.
The reviewed unbranched alkane series uses explicit C-C and C-H single covalent bonds.
The listed C, H and O states are the closed explanatory domain for hydrocarbon combustion rewrites.
Formation of carbon dioxide is compatible with these theoretical complete-combustion outcomes.

applicability.required_context: the reviewed complete-combustion outcome; no temperature, pressure, quantity, or macroscopic-effect model
